title: Cockpitdecks Configuration Schema
description: Schema for Cockpitdecks environment, deck, and page configurations.

anyOf.description: Sequence of commands with optional delay/condition

type.description: Activation type. Known core values: begin-end-command, cockpit, deck, encoder, encoder-mode, encoder-push, encoder-toggle, encoder-value, encoder-value-extended, inspect, mosaic, none, obs, page, page-cycle, push, reload, short-or-long-press, simulator, slider, stop, sweep, swipe, theme. Extensions may add more.

commands.description: Named commands for this activation's events

positions.description: Ordered list of commands for sweep/positional activation

label.title: Label
label.description: Top label shown on the button

label-size.title: Lbl size
label-size.description: Font size for the top label

label-font.description: Font file to use for the label
label-font.title: Lbl font

label-position.title: Lbl position
label-position.description: Alignment of the label on the button Known values: ['lt', 'ct', 'rt', 'lm', 'cm', 'rm', 'lb', 'cb', 'rb']

sound.description: Sound file to play on activation
sound.title: Sound

auto-repeat.title: Auto-repeat
auto-repeat.description: Keep triggering the command while held

auto-repeat-delay.title: Auto-repeat delay
auto-repeat-delay.description: Delay in seconds before repeat starts

delay.title: Delay
delay.description: Time in seconds before execution (can be formula)

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Only execute if this formula evaluates to true

toggle-on.title: Command when toggling ON (press while OFF)

toggle-off.title: Command when toggling OFF (press while ON)

toggle-on.title: Command when toggling ON (press while OFF)

toggle-off.title: Command when toggling OFF (press while ON)

type.description: Representation type. Known core values: annunciator, annunciator-animate, chart, circular-switch, compass, data, decor, draw-animation, draw-base, ftg, gauge, hardware-icon, icon, icon-animation, icon-base-do-not-use, icon-color, knob, led, mosaic, multi-buttons, multi-icons, multi-texts, push-switch, solari, station-fancy-base, station-plot-base, switch, switch-base, tape, text, textpage, virtual-encoder, virtual-led, weather-icon-base. Extensions may add more.

button-fill-color.title: Button Fill Color
button-fill-color.description: Background color of the button circular base

button-stroke-color.title: Button Stroke Color
button-stroke-color.description: Border color of the button base

button-underline-width.title: Button Underline Width
button-underline-width.description: Width of decorative underline (0 to disable)

base-underline-color.title: Base Underline Color
base-underline-color.description: Color for the baseplate decorative underline

base-underline-width.title: Base Underline Width
base-underline-width.description: Width of the baseplate decorative underline

handle-fill-color.title: Handle Fill Color
handle-fill-color.description: Primary color of the switch handle/lever

top-fill-color.title: Top Fill Color
top-fill-color.description: Color for the top cap of the handle

top-stroke-color.title: Top Stroke Color
top-stroke-color.description: Border color for the top cap

top-stroke-width.title: Top Stroke Width
top-stroke-width.description: Width of the top cap border

tick-space.title: Tick Space
tick-space.description: Distance from base to graduation marks

needle-start.title: Needle Start
needle-start.description: Distance from center to start of needle
